name: Creme De Menthe Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the chocolate syrup.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour and salt.
4. Alternate adding the dry ingredients with the milk to the butter mixture, mixing gently after each addition.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan and spread evenly.
7. Bake for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
For the frosting:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the creme de menthe, half of the remaining butter, and powdered sugar until smooth.
2. Add milk or water as needed to achieve a spreadable consistency.
3. Spread the frosting over the cooled brownies.
4. Melt the chocolate chips and remaining butter in a microwave-safe bowl, stirring until smooth.
5. Pour the melted chocolate over the frosted brownies and spread evenly.
6. Cut into small pieces once set.
These are very rich and best enjoyed fresh after cutting.
